exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your mortgage management forward
items: Gather and organize all your financial documents including pay stubs, tax returns, bank statements, and debt information
Calculate your debt-to-income ratio and determine your maximum affordable monthly housing payment
Research and schedule consultations with at least 3 different mortgage lenders to compare rates, fees, and loan programs
Check and improve your credit score by pulling your free credit reports and addressing any errors or negative items
Research first-time homebuyer programs and down payment assistance options available in your area
Create a detailed home buying timeline and set specific target dates for each major milestone
